title: (Bullish Signal) ZECUSD, MACD Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling ZECUSD's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron A.I. dvisor identified 47 similar cases where ZECUSD's MACD histogram became positive, and 35 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 74%.Current price $58.03 crossed the support line at $58.69 and is trading between $58.69 support and $57.92 support lines. Throughout the month of 10/17/20 - 11/08/20, the price experienced a -4% Downtrend, while the week of 11/03/20 - 11/08/20 shows a +14% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/mdwdklelt8y51.png?width=1527&format=png&auto=webp&s=f2b78ef403ba716804a56f220ad03b09c400e1c0

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on November 06, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on ZECUSD as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 58 of 87 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 67%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for ZECUSD just turned positive on November 08, 2020. Looking at past instances where ZECUSD's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 35 of 47 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 74%.

Following a +13.77% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where ZECUSD advanced for three days, in 200 of 301 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 66%.
